parameters.prompt:
Segment this email list:

Subscribers: {{$json.subscribers}}

Segments:
1. New prospects (never ordered)
2. Customers (ordered once)
3. VIP customers (>500k lifetime)
4. Inactive (>30 days)

Create targeted campaigns for each segment
parameters.name: Segment List

parameters.prompt:
Create welcome email for new subscribers:
Tone: Professional, welcoming
Include: -10% code (BIENVENUE10)
CTA: Discover products
parameters.name: Welcome Email

parameters.prompt:
Create re-engagement email for inactive:
Tone: We miss you
Include: Special offer to come back
parameters.name: Re-engagement

parameters.prompt:
Create post-purchase thank you email:
Tone: Thankful
Include: Request review, cross-sell
parameters.name: Post-Purchase
